component.name: floating-button
component.description: A circular Floating Action Button (FAB). Used for the primary or persistent action on a screen. Available as icon-only (circular) or with a label (pill). Supports three style variants and two context modes.

source.manifest_filename_note: Filename typo in Figma export ('mainifest.json'). Preserved as-is.

discarded_axes.RTL: Icon-only circular shape produces zero CSS delta for RTL. Partially retained: [dir='rtl'] selector reverses flex-direction for labeled mode only.

state_implementation: CSS pseudo-classes and attribute selectors — not duplicated HTML markup.
implementation_notes: Local CSS custom properties (--_fab-bg, --_fab-bg-hover, etc.) are defined on .fab and overridden per style/context modifier. State selectors consume only local variables.
All --fab-* tokens are missing from token.css. Provisional definitions are in a :root block at the top of floating-button.css with TODO comments.
Focus: both :focus and :focus-visible are applied. .is-focused class added for static showcase display.
Pressing the button cancels the focus ring (fab:active::after { opacity: 0 }).
Disabled state uses pointer-events: none to prevent hover/active interference.
RTL: [dir='rtl'] .fab reverses flex-direction for labeled mode.
